question: From the attached vendor invoice, extract all fields required to book the entry.
output_format: Invoice Date | Vendor | GSTIN | Taxable Value | CGST | SGST | IGST | HSN/SAC | Invoice No
rubric_skeleton: One fact-check per field (exact / numeric +-tol) + contradiction dealbreaker

question: Map the given expense to the correct ledger head and parent group in this client's chart of accounts.
output_format: Ledger: <head> | Under Group: <group>
rubric_skeleton: Ledger correct + group correct + contradiction

question: For this professional-fee bill, determine GST treatment and TDS applicability.
output_format: GST Rate | ITC Eligible (Y/N) | TDS Section (194x) | TDS Rate | TDS Amount | Threshold Crossed (Y/N)
rubric_skeleton: Each field a fact-check; numeric +-tol; contradiction

question: Invoice has no GSTIN and category is ambiguous (Marketing vs Software Subscription). Decide auto-post vs queue, score confidence, justify.
output_format: Decision (Auto-post/Queue) | Confidence % | Suggested Ledger | Reason | Client Nudge Needed (Y/N)
rubric_skeleton: Decision (fact); confidence band (judgment); reason valid (judgment); contradiction

question: Reconcile the month's bank statement against the cash ledger. List reconciling items and the reconciled balance.
output_format: Reconciled Balance | per item: Description | Amount | Adjusts(book/bank) | Category
rubric_skeleton: Balance +-tol; per-item precision/recall; category accuracy; tie = dealbreaker

question: Reconcile Amazon Seller Central settlement vs bank credits vs recorded sales. Flag every gap.
output_format: Settlement Total | Bank Matched | Sales Recorded | per gap: Type | Amount | Likely Cause
rubric_skeleton: Totals +-tol; gap precision/recall; cause categorization; contradiction

question: Reconcile the vendor's statement against our payable ledger. List differences.
output_format: Our Balance | Vendor Balance | per diff: Doc No | Amount | Reason
rubric_skeleton: Both balances +-tol; diff precision/recall; reason; contradiction

question: From the payment register, identify every payment that attracts TDS, with section and rate.
output_format: per payment: Party | Amount | TDS Section | Rate | TDS Amount
rubric_skeleton: Precision/recall on which attract TDS; per-field correctness; contradiction

question: Compute total monthly TDS liability and prepare the challan summary due by the 7th.
output_format: per section: Section | Total Payment | TDS | Total TDS Payable | Due Date
rubric_skeleton: Section totals +-tol; grand total; due date exact; contradiction

question: Generate the GSTR-1 outward-supply summary from sales data and flag ITC mismatches vs GSTR-2B.
output_format: GSTR-1: B2B/B2C | Taxable | CGST | SGST | IGST | per mismatch: GSTIN | Invoice | Issue
rubric_skeleton: Summary +-tol; mismatch precision/recall; issue type; contradiction

question: Reconcile ITC: GSTR-2B vs purchase register. List every mismatch with type.
output_format: per mismatch: Vendor GSTIN | Invoice | Issue(not-filed/GSTIN-mismatch/invoice-mismatch/value-diff) | Total ITC at risk
rubric_skeleton: Mismatch precision/recall; type accuracy; total +-tol; contradiction

question: Produce the monthly MIS from the trial balance: revenue by segment, gross margin, burn, runway, AR/AP ageing.
output_format: Revenue by Segment | Gross Margin % | Monthly Burn | Runway (months) | AR Ageing | AP Ageing
rubric_skeleton: Each figure +-tol (fact); ageing buckets (fact); contradiction

question: Write variance commentary explaining the MoM change in burn rate, citing the two largest drivers.
output_format: Burn MoM Change | Driver 1 (line item + amount) | Driver 2 | Commentary (2-3 sentences)
rubric_skeleton: Change figure (fact); two drivers (fact); commentary coherent (judgment); contradiction

question: Compute payroll from salary master and attendance: gross, statutory deductions, net pay.
output_format: Gross | PF | ESI | PT | TDS | Net Pay
rubric_skeleton: Each component +-tol; net pay; contradiction

question: Run standard validation checks and list red flags: negative asset balances, credit balances in expense accounts, inter-company imbalances.
output_format: per flag: Account | Issue Type | Amount | Severity
rubric_skeleton: Red-flag precision/recall (misses AND fabrications); issue-type accuracy; contradiction

question: Identify stock transfers between entities (e.g. BT Bangalore -> BT Chennai) not booked as sale in source and purchase in receiver. Flag and recommend the correcting entry.
output_format: per item: Transfer | From Entity | To Entity | Amount | Missing Leg | Recommended Entry
rubric_skeleton: Detection precision/recall (fact); missing-leg (fact); entry valid (judgment); contradiction

question: Check the trial balance for entries in suspense/unclassified ledgers and list for reclassification.
output_format: per item: Date | Ledger | Amount | Suggested Reclass
rubric_skeleton: Suspense-item precision/recall; contradiction

question: Close blocked by missing documents. Draft ONE consolidated query email listing exactly which documents are missing and for which transactions.
output_format: Subject | Body: greeting + bulleted missing docs with transaction refs + deadline ask + close
rubric_skeleton: All missing docs listed (fact checklist); specific refs (fact); single consolidated ask (judgment); tone (judgment)

question: Client disputes a TDS deduction, claiming a lower-deduction certificate. Draft a reply explaining current deduction, requesting the certificate, and stating what changes if valid.
output_format: Subject | Body: acknowledge + explain treatment + request certificate + revised treatment if valid + close
rubric_skeleton: Explanation correct (fact); certificate requested (fact); revised treatment (fact); tone (judgment); contradiction

question: Given the IRL and current VDR folder contents, classify each request's status (New Request / Info Shared / Info Partially Shared / Outstanding).
output_format: per item: Sl# | Checklist Item | Status
rubric_skeleton: Status-match precision/recall per item; contradiction

question: Produce the priority-wise request status summary: count of High/Medium/Low items by status, per workstream.
output_format: matrix: Status x {High,Medium,Low,Total} for Finance / Tax / Secretarial / Legal
rubric_skeleton: Each cell count exact; totals tie; flag any #REF!/broken cell as data-quality issue; contradiction

question: List all High-criticality items still outstanding (New Request) that block sign-off on the Financial DD.
output_format: per item: Sl# | Area | Checklist | Criticality
rubric_skeleton: Outstanding-High precision/recall; contradiction

question: Check the IRL for internal inconsistencies in the stated DD period and entity name across all sheets; flag each.
output_format: per inconsistency: Location | Stated Value | Conflicts With | Issue
rubric_skeleton: Inconsistency precision/recall (fact); issue description (judgment); contradiction

question: From the cap table in the Secretarial folder, extract the fully-diluted shareholding pattern.
output_format: per holder: Shareholder | Class | Shares | % (fully diluted) | Total = 100%
rubric_skeleton: Per-holder fact-check; % sums to 100 (+-tol); contradiction

question: From the FAR, extract gross block, accumulated depreciation, and net block as at each balance-sheet date in the DD period.
output_format: per FY: Gross Block | Accum Dep | Net Block
rubric_skeleton: Each figure +-tol; net = gross - accdep; contradiction

question: From the trade-receivables ageing, extract the >180-day bucket and the ECL/PBD provision recognized at each reporting date.
output_format: per FY: >180d Gross | Provision (ECL/PBD) | Provision %
rubric_skeleton: Each figure +-tol; provision % derived; contradiction

question: Tie the Tally accounting backup to the audited financial statements for FY2023-24. List every line that does not agree.
output_format: per break: Line Item | Per Tally | Per Audited | Difference
rubric_skeleton: Break precision/recall; amounts +-tol; total diff; tie dealbreaker
maps_to: Eldaas Finance 1.2 Tally backup vs FS

question: Reconcile payroll per the monthly payroll statements against payroll expense in the GL for the DD period. Flag variances.
output_format: per period: Per Payroll | Per GL | Variance | per variance: cause
rubric_skeleton: Variance precision/recall; amounts +-tol; tie dealbreaker; contradiction

question: Reconcile TDS credit per Form 26AS against TDS recorded in books for the review period. List mismatches.
output_format: per mismatch: Deductor | Per 26AS | Per Books | Difference | Cause
rubric_skeleton: Mismatch precision/recall; amounts +-tol; tie; contradiction

question: Perform the GST 2B reconciliation: credit per GSTR-3B vs GSTR-2B vs books. Flag gaps.
output_format: Credit per 3B | per 2B | per Books | per gap: GSTIN | Amount | Type
rubric_skeleton: Gap precision/recall; amounts +-tol; three-way tie; contradiction

output_format: per flag: Vendor | MSME Status | Amount | Days Outstanding | Exposure
rubric_skeleton: Flag precision/recall (fact); 45-day cutoff applied (fact); exposure note (judgment); contradiction

question: Scan the registration-documents folder and flag any statutory registration missing or only partially shared (e.g. TAN pending, PF/PT/ESI not provided).
output_format: per flag: Registration | Status | Criticality | Note
rubric_skeleton: Gap precision/recall (presence check); contradiction

question: Identify related-party transactions during the DD period and flag any not confirmed at arm's length.
output_format: per RPT: Related Party | Nature | Amount | Arm's-length Confirmed (Y/N) | Flag
rubric_skeleton: RPT detection precision/recall (fact); arm's-length flag (judgment); contradiction

question: Review the revenue-recognition policy and sample invoices; flag any indication of cut-off issues or revenue booked ahead of delivery.
output_format: per flag: Invoice | Issue | Period Impact | Materiality
rubric_skeleton: Cut-off issue identification (judgment); period impact (fact where derivable); contradiction

question: From ITR and assessment records, list all open assessments, demands, and litigations with estimated exposure.
output_format: per matter: Authority | AY | Nature | Demand/Exposure | Status
rubric_skeleton: Matter precision/recall; amounts +-tol; status; contradiction

question: Review foreign-currency payments and 15CA/15CB forms; flag any overseas payment lacking proper withholding / 15CB certification.
output_format: per flag: Payment | Amount (forex) | 15CA/15CB Present (Y/N) | Withholding Done (Y/N) | Exposure

question: Check annual ROC filings (MGT-7, AOC-4) for each FY in the DD period and flag any missing or late filing.
output_format: per FY: MGT-7 (filed/late/missing) | AOC-4 (filed/late/missing)

question: Review all share allotments and transfers in the period; flag any allotment missing PAS-3/PAS-4 or transfer missing stamp duty.
output_format: per event: Type(Allotment/Transfer) | Date | Required Doc | Present (Y/N) | Flag

question: Verify the statutory registers (Members, Directors, Charges, Investments, etc.) are maintained and complete; flag any missing register.
output_format: per register: Name | Maintained (Y/N) | Gap Note
rubric_skeleton: Register precision/recall (presence check); contradiction

question: Draft the financial-DD findings for the BS-Assets section: for each material observation, state issue, financial impact, and recommendation.
output_format: per finding: Observation | Financial Impact | Recommendation
rubric_skeleton: All material findings covered (fact checklist); impact quantified where derivable (fact); recommendation valid (judgment)

question: Write the executive-summary risk commentary categorizing all red flags found into deal-breakers, price-adjustment items, and disclosure items.
output_format: per red flag: Issue | Category(deal-breaker/price-adjust/disclosure) | Rationale
